title: wolfhsm cryptocb.rs: CryptoCbGuard RAII with OnceLock guard
description: Create wolfhsm/src/cryptocb.rs. DEV_ID: i32 = 0x5748534D_u32 as i32 (WH_DEV_ID 'WHSM'). CryptoCbGuard(()) struct: created by Client::register_cryptocb(&self) -> Result<CryptoCbGuard, WolfHsmError>. Use static REGISTERED: AtomicBool to prevent double-registration: compare_exchange(false, true, SeqCst, SeqCst). On success: call wc_CryptoCb_RegisterDevice(DEV_ID, wh_Client_CryptoCb, ctx_ptr) via wolfcrypt-sys or wolfhsm-sys (whichever exposes wc_CryptoCb_RegisterDevice). Drop impl of CryptoCbGuard calls wc_CryptoCb_UnRegisterDevice(DEV_ID) and resets REGISTERED to false. Expose DEV_ID as pub const for callers to use with wolfCrypt _ex init variants. In lib.rs: pub mod cryptocb; pub use cryptocb::DEV_ID;
